overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the navigation bridge of a vessel moving through choppy coastal waters. The scene features operational navigation monitors displaying radar and chart data, with overcast stormy weather and grey seas visible through the forward windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with forward deck observation

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel through coastal waters while monitoring the radar display and navigation charts

entered.detail: leftmost display screen showing digital nautical chart with coastline
central circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep indicator
rightmost display showing ship systems data and readouts
red-painted forward deck with metal safety railings and bow structure
choppy grey sea surface extending to the horizon under overcast skies

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through rough coastal waters. Three navigation monitors are visible at the top of the frame, with the central radar actively sweeping. The red-painted bow deck extends forward into the grey, wave-chopped sea while the digital chart on the left monitor displays the nearby coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates through a turbulent coastal environment. It begins with a view of the interior bridge, where three navigation monitors dominate the upper frame and a central radar actively sweeps. As the camera looks forward, the focus shifts toward the red-painted bow deck extending into a grey, wave-chopped sea. The scene then integrates the digital chart on the left monitor, which tracks the ship's progress along the nearby coastline amidst the rough waters.
